message:
fix(self-upgrade): preserve image digest + close admin-gate fail-open (#7950, #7951) (#7992)

- #7950: TriggerUpgrade previously guarded the admin-role check behind
  `if h.store != nil`. If the handler was constructed without a store
  (missing dependency wiring, init failure, or test fixture), every
  authenticated user became an effective admin for a privileged endpoint
  that can roll the console to any image. Flip the guard: return 503
  "self-upgrade unavailable" when the store is nil instead of silently
  allowing the upgrade.

- #7951: the image rewriter stripped `@sha256:...` from the current image
  and rebuilt the reference with only `repo:tag`, silently losing the
  digest pin. A hardened install deliberately pins the backend image by
  digest for supply-chain integrity; an in-cluster self-upgrade would
  therefore loosen that gate on every trigger. Capture the digest
  suffix before stripping and reattach it to the rewritten image so the
  admin still has to opt into a tag-only reference.

Fixes #7950
Fixes #7951

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
